en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 58

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 58
Top Question of the Week
Wen DIGITALAX V3?

Very soon. Patience web3 fashionauts. You’ve made it with us this far and with all of the noise in the market it couldn’t be a better time to release revamped guides on how to make it in web3 using the most advanced web3 fashion ecosystem that there is.
Most Common Repeat Question
What do I do when everything is red?
This is not financial advice. Maybe general guidance on how to stay steady and forge ahead during uncertain times.

At the end of the day, all markets have down days, and the best thing to do always is to remember why you’re here and what you believe in for now and the future. Build, buy and hold what brings you joy and don’t let the strategic spreaders of confusion sway you’re resolve.

If, like us, you see the greatest economic transition in history fundamentally underway with vast new infrastructure being upgraded and released almost daily, it’s clear the scale up to the full self sovereign global, interoperable and open web3 metaverse has barely gotten started. We’re not early, we’re not late, we’re right on time for the new boom spearheaded by #cc0summer and a wide range of web3 assets you can actually use.
And, in times of general anxiety throughout the old industrial markets, what better time to shift into the new. Let the shakeout continue.
Top Controversies

If real freedom of expression and uncensored media distribution is going to continue growing towards a level of freedom we have unfortunately never seen yet, the next big wave is clearly going to need true self sovereign entirely web3 social media platform build out.

The early work from blue sky and lens protocol is promising, but needs rapid acceleration. The sooner we have a Youtube alternative free from arbitrary algorithmic and entirely opaque semi-woke semi-alt-right moderation impulses from the entirely corporate interest liability avoiding folks at YT, the better for all of humanity. Not just those of us that actually think that information and genuine debate in the marketplace of ideas is essential for the sustenance and flourishing of free societies.
Just what justification could YT possibly have for banning Bankless. It’s outrageous.
They do it because they can. It’s time to move from “trust us we won’t be evil”, to the platform’s we rely on being agnostic to the clearly non-toxic content being carried so they can’t be evil.

It’s not that moderation isn’t a very hard question to solve, but even in it’s earliest points the Blue Sky team is showing some smart insight in a way that doesn’t limit free speech and destroy the commons, unlike how badly all big tech has and continues to fuck it up.
Silly Fails and Trolling
Plenty of wallets are looking worse than the Raccoons in this vid. If you ask me, the Raccoons are kinda stylish.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 58

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 58
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
إمتى DIGITALAX V3؟

Very soon. Patience web3 fashionauts. You’ve made it مع us this far و مع all من ال noise في ال market it couldn’t be a better time الى release revamped guides على ازاي الى make it في web3 using ال most advanced web3 فاشون النظام that there is.
Most Common Repeat سؤال
أعمل إيه لما كل حاجة تبقى حمرا؟
This is not financial advice. Maybe general guidance على ازاي الى stay steady و forge ahead during uncertain times.

At ال end من ال day, all markets have down days, و ال best thing الى do always is الى remember ليه you’re here و what you believe في لـ now و ال future. Build, buy و hold what brings you joy و don’t let ال strategic spreaders من confusion sway you’re resolve.

If, like us, you see ال greatest economic transition في history fundamentally underway مع vast جديد infrastructure being upgraded و released almost daily, it’s clear ال scale up الى ال full self sovereign global, interoperable و open web3 metaverse has barely gotten started. We’re not early, we’re not late, we’re right على time لـ ال جديد boom spearheaded by #cc0summer و a wide range من web3 assets you can actually use.
و, في times من general anxiety throughout ال old industrial markets, what better time الى shift into ال جديد. Let ال shakeout continue.
أهم الجدل في المجال

If real freedom من expression و uncensored media distribution is going الى continue growing towards a level من freedom we have unfortunately never seen yet, ال next big wave is clearly going الى need true self sovereign entirely web3 سوشيال media platform build out.

ال early work من blue sky و لينز بروتوكول is promising, but needs rapid acceleration. ال sooner we have a Youtube alternative free من arbitrary algorithmic و entirely opaque semi-woke semi-alt-right moderation impulses من ال entirely corporate interest liability avoiding folks at YT, ال better لـ all من humanity. Not just those من us that actually think that information و genuine debate في ال marketplace من ideas is essential لـ ال sustenance و flourishing من free societies.
Just what justification could YT possibly have لـ banning Bankless. It’s outrageous.
They do it because they can. It’s time الى move من “trust us we won’t be evil”, الى ال platform’s we rely على being agnostic الى ال clearly non-toxic content being carried so they can’t be evil.

It’s not that moderation isn’t a very hard سؤال الى solve, but even في it’s earliest points ال Blue Sky team is showing some smart insight في a way that doesn’t limit free speech و destroy ال commons, unlike ازاي badly all big tech has و continues الى fuck it up.
Silly Fails و Trolling
Plenty من wallets are looking worse than ال Raccoons في this vid. If you ask me, ال Raccoons are kinda stylish.
